zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecilia Bigod於1090年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾貝爾沃易 卡素時，她的父親Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk42歲，母親Adelise de Tosny27歲。她和William Brito Albini至少有3個兒子。她去世於1135年12月5日在她的家鄉享年45歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾波泰斯福德。

nameMeanings.name: Bigod
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Jaroslaw, Jozef, Krystyna, Slawomir.

Polish and Jewish (from Poland): from bigos, formerlydenoting anything that was chopped or slashed, now a particular dishcomposed of hash and sauerkraut; also ‘confusion’; hence perhaps anickname for someone who caused confusion.

nameMeanings.name: Cecilia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

variants.name: Cecelia
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecilia Bigod was born in 1090, in Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk, was 42 and her mother, Adelise de Tosny, was 27. She had at least 3 sons with William Brito Albini. She died on 5 December 1135, in her hometown, at the age of 45, and was buried in Bottesford, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecilia Bigod est née en 1090, à Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Adelise de Tosny, avait 27 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils avec William Brito Albini. Elle est décédée le 5 décembre 1135, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Bottesford, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, England,: Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Cecilia Bigod 1090 in Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk 42 und ihre Mutter Adelise de Tosny 27. Sie hatte mit William Brito Albini mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 5. Dezember 1135 im Alter von 45 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Bottesford, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecilia Bigod è nata il nel 1090 nel Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Adelise de Tosny, aveva 27 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli con William Brito Albini. Morì il 5 dicembre 1135, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolta a Bottesford, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecilia Bigodが1090年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアベルボイル カストルで生まれた時，父Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolkは42歳，母Adelise de Tosnyは27歳であった。彼女はWilliam Brito Albiniとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1135年12月5日に故郷で45歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアボッテスフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecilia Bigod(이)가 1090년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 벨보이르 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelise de Tosny(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 William Brito Albini(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1135년 12월 5일 그녀의 고향에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 벗츠퍼드에 묻혔다.

Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos com William Brito Albini. Ela faleceu em 5 de dezembro de 1135, em sua cidade natal, com 45 anos, e foi sepultada em Bottesford, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecilia Bigod родилась в 1090 г. в местности белвоир кастл, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Adelise de Tosny, 27. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына от William Brito Albini. Она умерла 5 декабря 1135 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности боттесфорд, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cecilia Bigod nació en 1090, en Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Adelise de Tosny, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con William Brito Albini. Murió el 5 de diciembre de 1135, en su pueblo, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultada en Bottesford, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
